meta.title: MJ Barbershop — Premium Barbershop in Dubai
meta.description: Classic cuts, hot towel shaves and VIP grooming in the heart of Dubai. Book your chair at MJ Barbershop — where craft meets precision.

services.subheading: Transparent pricing, no surprises — just great work.
